zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cheynduit於1327年出生在英國可瓦爾博德明時，她的父親William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan32歲，母親Eizabeth FitzHerbert25歲。她於大約1344年與Stephen Treiago在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年在英國享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cheynduit于1327年出生在英国可瓦爾博德明时，她的父亲William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan32岁，母亲Eizabeth FitzHerbert25岁。她于大约1344年与Stephen Treiago在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年在英国享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cheynduit was born in 1327, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, her father, William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan, was 32 and her mother, Eizabeth FitzHerbert, was 25. She married Stephen Treiago about 1344, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1400, in England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cheynduit est née en 1327, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eizabeth FitzHerbert, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Treiago environ 1344, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cheynduit 1327 in Bodmin, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan 32 und ihre Mutter Eizabeth FitzHerbert 25. Sie hat um 1344 in Cornwall, England Stephen Treiago geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 73 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cheynduit è nata il nel 1327 nel Bodmin, Cornwall, England, sua padre, William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eizabeth FitzHerbert, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Treiago circa 1344, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1400, nel England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cheynduitが1327年にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで生まれた時，父William Cheynduit Lord of Bodananは32歳，母Eizabeth FitzHerbertは25歳であった。約1344年にイギリスコルンワルでStephen Treiagoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年にイギリスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cheynduit(이)가 1327년 영국 코른월 보드민에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eizabeth FitzHerbert(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1344년 영국 코른월에서 Stephen Treiago(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cheynduit nasceu em 1327, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eizabeth FitzHerbert, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Treiago aproximadamente 1344, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1400, em Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cheynduit родилась в 1327 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eizabeth FitzHerbert, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Treiago около 1344 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Cheynduit nació en 1327, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, William Cheynduit Lord of Bodanan, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eizabeth FitzHerbert, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Stephen Treiago aproximadamente 1344, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1400, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
